event: Urban scene with red pipes and stairways in St. Petersburg
description: An expressionist painting of an urban courtyard or alleyway, likely in St. Petersburg. The scene shows buildings with staircases, archways, and prominently featured red pipes running along walls and through the space. The palette is dominated by dark greens and grays with bold red accents from the pipes. Red radiant lines appear on the left side, possibly suggesting sunlight or an abstract element. The architecture is rendered in a semi-abstract, angular style with heavy outlines. The overall mood is dark and industrial, capturing the character of a city's inner courtyards.
